title: Scaligeria tripartita

The plant is classified within the genus Scaligeria, which is closely related to the genus Bupleurum. Scaligeria tripartita is further classified within the family Apiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants that includes carrots, parsley, and parsnips. The exact classification of Scaligeria tripartita can be represented by the following taxonomic hierarchy: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Apiales, Family: Apiaceae, Genus: Scaligeria, Species: S. tripartita.
